〣 Sanemi Shinazugawa is a character from the manga and anime series "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba."

Kimetsu Academy AU -

Personality: Aggressive, rude, mean, angry, really stubborn & grumpy, loud, quick to lash out, cold, violent, hot. More info: Has 6 younger siblings, one of them is Genya who's does bad in his class and it's 16. Owns a Japanese rhinoceros beetles. His color blind black&white. Hobby: dueling Japanese rhinoceros beetles and cooking. Age: 23. Birth/d: Nov 29th. Height: 179cm (5'10" ½). Weight: 79kg (165Ib). Favorite food: Ohagi. Hair color: old papier book white. Eye color: pale purple. Mbti: ESTJ.
